fields.ready_p: Enabling-conditions percentile: civic fabric 50%, knowledge proximity 25%, grid headroom 25% (excludes existing community energy)
fields.presence_p: Existing community-energy percentile (orgs + project sites per 100k people; share of LADs strictly below, so no-CE LADs = 0)
fields.know_name: Name of the nearest energy knowledge base (from LAD centroid)
fields.opportunity: ready_p − presence_p: high = good conditions but little community energy yet (easy wins)
fields.struggle: need_p × (1 − ready_p): high = deprived AND thin enabling conditions (hardest ground)
fields.typology: thriving / latent (easy win) / pioneering / cold, from median split of readiness × presence
fields.cap_kw: Installed capacity (kW) summed over CEE-map project sites — partial: 2024 vintage, not all schemes carry a size
